errors.service_unavailable: Service is unavailable. Please try again later.
common.name: Name
error.desc_401: You need to be logged in to access this page. Please sign in to continue.
error.desc_403: You don't have permission to access this resource. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
error.desc_404: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. It may have been moved or deleted.
error.desc_500: Our servers encountered an unexpected error. Please try again or contact your administrator.
error.desc_default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
authError.mail.subject: Shoehorn access issue
authError.hint.generic.title: Access denied
authError.hint.generic.detail: An authentication error occurred. Your administrator can help resolve this.
authError.hint.groupsClaimMissing.title: Identity provider isn't sharing groups
authError.hint.groupsClaimMissing.detail: Your identity provider did not include a "groups" claim in the login token, so Shoehorn can't determine your role. This is a provider configuration issue — your administrator needs to enable the groups claim.
authError.hint.groupsClaimMissing.docsLa: Read the Okta group-claims setup guide
authError.hint.noRoles.title: No role assigned
authError.hint.noRoles.detail: You're authenticated, but no Shoehorn role is mapped to your groups. Ask your administrator to configure a group → role mapping, or add your group to the admin allowlist.
authError.hint.invalidDomain.title: Identity provider unreachable
authError.hint.invalidDomain.detail: Shoehorn couldn't reach your configured identity provider. This is usually a misconfigured domain (extra scheme or trailing slash) or a temporary network issue.
authError.hint.jwksUnavailable.title: Can't verify login signature
authError.hint.jwksUnavailable.detail: Shoehorn couldn't fetch the signing keys from your identity provider. This usually means a temporary outage — wait a moment and try again.
